name: 422-policy-violation
title: 422 Unprocessable Content — policy violation
description: The media type and body are consistent and the query parses, but it fails semantic/policy validation: it sorts on a member the operation's $.sort policy does not expose. Per the D2 taxonomy this is a 422 carrying the semantic diagnostic (§4.5, §6.4).

$errors.message: Member 'salary' is not exposed to .sort() by the GetEmployees operation policy.
